hero.title: Media & Appearances
hero.description: This section brings together a selection of public interventions, academic conferences, media contributions and participations in scientific and professional events.

talks.section_description: I regularly participate in academic conferences, professional workshops and international forums on regional integration, strategic management, governance and socio-economic development in Africa.

talk1.title: Regional Integration and Business Performance within the AfCFTA Framework
talk1.description: A presentation focused on the economic challenges of regional integration and the impact of the AfCFTA on the competitiveness of African businesses.
talk1.link_aria: View details of the conference on regional integration and the AfCFTA
talk1.img_alt: Academic talk on regional integration and the AfCFTA

talk2.title: Strategic Marketing, Institutional Communication and Organisational Performance
talk2.description: A training session for executives and institutional managers on strategic positioning tools, communication and results management.
talk2.link_aria: View details of the talk on strategic marketing
talk2.img_alt: Professional workshop on strategic marketing and institutional communication

talk3.title: Territorial Governance and Local Development: Challenges and Perspectives in West Africa
talk3.description: A scientific presentation on institutional dynamics, local public policies and governance mechanisms aimed at performance and impact.
talk3.link_aria: View the presentation on territorial governance
talk3.img_alt: Scientific paper on territorial governance and local development

press.section_description: My analyses and talks are sometimes featured in specialised media and platforms, covering development issues, regional integration, management and institutional transformation in Africa.
